title: Filming in Historic St. Augustine: Permits, Locations, and What You Need to Know
excerpt: St. Augustine is one of the most frequently filmed small cities in the United States. It also has a permitting environment and practical production context that's different from most places.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Video production in historic St. Augustine Florida

content.alt: Filming in St. Augustine historic district
content.caption: Local knowledge is a production asset that translates directly into more efficient shoots

seo.title: Filming St. Augustine FL | Permits, Locations, Guide
seo.description: Guide to filming in historic St. Augustine: permits, locations, the Castillo, Flagler College, and production knowledge from a decade of local experience.

schema.headline: Filming in Historic St. Augustine: Permits, Locations, and What You Need to Know
schema.description: A practical guide to filming in St. Augustine covering permits, locations, and production knowledge.
